case_title: WILLIAM PONNELL et al VS. WILLIAM RASTETTER et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONNELL, WILLIAM FORD, JAMEIKA AS TO DEFENDANT RASTETTER, WILLIAM RASTETTER, ANDREW DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-27-2013 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAR-12-2013

ARBITRATOR PAUL RAYMOND PERDUE APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION APR-22-2013 THROUGH JUL-21-2013.

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR APR-22-2013. MAR-27-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONNELL, WILLIAM FORD, JAMEIKA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
JURY FEES DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF FORD, JAMEIKA
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PONNELL, WILLIAM FORD, JAMEIKA
ORDER EXTENDING THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION TO SEP-03-2013

PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PONNELL SHALL RECOVER $25,000.00 AND PLAINTIFF JAMEIKA FORD SHALL RECOVER $6500.00 ON THEIR COMPLAINT FROM DEFENDANTS WILLIAM RASTETTER AND ANDREW RASTETTER EXCEPT THAT, AS TO PLAINTIFF WILLIAM PONNELL, THE LIABILITY OF DEFENDANT WILLIAM RASTETTER IS LIMITED TO $15,000.00 PURSUANT TO VEHICLE CODE STATED ON AWARD. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR HIS/HER OWN COSTS OF COURT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE ARB DEADLINE AND ARB REVIEW HEARING FILED BY PONNELL, WILLIAM FORD, JAMEIKA RASTETTER, WILLIAM RASTETTER, ANDREW
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR PERDUE, PAUL RAYMOND
POS BY MAIL OF AWARD OF ARBITRATOR; STATEMENT OF DECISION OF ARBITRATOR FILED BY ARBITRATOR PAUL PERDUE
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
